# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Protocol Wealth LLC takes security seriously. If you discover a security
vulnerability in this repository, please report it responsibly.

**Please do not create public GitHub issues for security vulnerabilities.**

Instead, email: **security@protocolwealthllc.com**

Include:

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested remediation (if any)

We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and provide a detailed response
within 5 business days.

## Scope

This policy applies to:

- The code in this repository
- The production deployment (if applicable)

## Out of Scope

- Denial of service attacks
- Social engineering
- Physical security issues

## Contact

- Email: **security@protocolwealthllc.com**
- Legal / Compliance: **compliance@protocolwealthllc.com**

Protocol Wealth LLC is an SEC-registered investment adviser (CRD #335298).
